display_text: Quarterstaff, Cost: 875: Basic component item that increases attack speed and physical damage, enhancing a hero's right-click potential. Provides no active abilities, making it a core piece for building into more advanced DPS items like Butterfly or Sange and Yasha. Stats: Damage: +10, Attack Speed: +10.
